title: Pronouns
description: This datapack lets players pick from dynamic and customisable sets of pronouns, which are then displayed on the tab list for all to see.
body:
This datapack was created by Silabear and posted on the ["Under The Rainbow" PMC group](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/pronouns-datapack/)
# 🌈 Pronouns Datapack
This datapack lets all players select their pronouns (or select none), which will be displayed to the left of the tab list.

![Pronouns in tab list](https://i.postimg.cc/W1nDCwK4/image.png)

## How to use
To use the datapack, just run /trigger pick_pronouns to bring up a chat menu, where you can select from two lists.

![Pronouns selection screen, with two sets to pick from](https://i.postimg.cc/sXsm4td1/image.png)

If you only select pronouns from set 1, they will be the pronouns displayed. If you select pronouns from both sets, it will combine them (ie `he/him` + `they/them` = `he/they`, as in the image above). You can click the red X button to clear your pronouns.

If you want to use a pronoun set not from this list, then you can run the following command:
`scoreboard players display numberformat PLAYERNAME sb.display fixed {"text":"(PRONUNS/HERE)","color":"gray"}`

More options will be added to the list in future updates - if you have any which you would like me to add, let me know! :D

## Compatibility
Unlike other similar packs, this datapack does not use teams and therefore does work with any datapack which uses teams, but not datapacks which put a scoreboard in the tab list. This datapack does work with packs such as Creative Status.
